productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Printed Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves, has graphic print on the front and stud embellishment Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Use warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery Slip into absolute comfort with this black printed T-shirt from flying machine and hit the dance floor in style. Created using soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt looks great with denim trousers or skirts, or try it with shorts and kitten-heel sandals. Model statistics Product is a size L on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
